Short summary about this episode:
The Black Dog Mercenaries, led by Vult and aided by Kin, have captured Olga (a dark elf queen) and Chloe.

  • Chloe is defiled by five monstrous Ogres, breaking her will.

  • Olga is imprisoned on the deeper parts of her Black Fort, but remains composed until brought before Vult.

  • She fights back with lightning, killing most Ogres, but is exhausted.

  • She casts a holy virginity barrier around her pussy, but Vult and the mercenaries overpower it.

  • Vult rapes her first, followed by the other mercenaries, breaking her when he cums inside despite her protests. All of the mercenaries came outside 10 times.

  • In the end, both Olga and Chloe are submissive, servicing Vult’s cock while he lounges on the throne.

    Black Fort (Olga Discordia’s Base)

The levitating debris around it suggests magical disruption of gravity, while the shattered mountains in the background hint at a cataclysmic past.
